title: Memory Case Schema
description: Master schema representing a complete normalized memory forensics case. Aggregates all Volatility plugin outputs into a single structured document for AI consumption.

case_id.description: Unique identifier for this forensic case

memory_image.description: Path or name of the original memory dump file

acquisition_date.description: Date the memory dump was acquired (ISO 8601)

processes.description: List of processes from pslist (see process_schema.json)

cmdlines.description: List of command lines from cmdline (see cmdline_schema.json)

dlls.description: List of loaded DLLs from dlllist (see dll_schema.json)

privileges.description: List of process privileges from privs (see privilege_schema.json)

handles.description: List of handles from handles (see handle_schema.json)

connections.description: List of network connections from netscan (see network_schema.json)

malfind_hits.description: List of suspicious memory regions from malfind (see malfind_schema.json)
